legacy.content:
# Phase 30-04 Plan: Three-Column Layout
## Objective
Restructure grid navigation to a 3-column layout: - **Left panel** (~160px): Navigation — Inventory, Journal, Actions, Combat (when encounter) - **Center** (~420px): Map view (or narrative in first-person) - **Right panel** (~200px): Room stats + Journal (feed)
Header (health, progress, location) stays full-width. Footer (keyboard hints) stays full-width.
## Current State
- Full-width center with Map/Journal tabs - No persistent left or right panels - Room info in single line below center
## Layout Constants
- W = 800, H = 600 - LEFT_PANEL_W = 160 - RIGHT_PANEL_W = 200 - CENTER_W = W - LEFT_PANEL_W - RIGHT_PANEL_W - PAD*4 = 800 - 160 - 200 - 32 = 408
## Tasks
1. Define layout constants (left/right/center widths) 2. Left panel: vertical nav buttons (Inventory, Journal, Actions) + Combat when hasEncounter 3. Center: Map only (remove tabs); map fills center 4. Right panel: Room stats (fog, look excerpt) + Journal (feed lines) 5. Remove Map/Journal tab bar; layout is always 3-column
## Files
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` — registerNavigationScene layout
## Verification
- Left panel visible with nav buttons - Right panel shows room stats + journal - Center shows map - No tab bar in navigation
